title_working: He Promised to Give It All Away. $8 Billion Vanished.
warnings: Owner-directed 4th episode (2026-06-18). Owner chose crypto fraud after asking for a more famous / higher-view, recent topic. Series so far: Miranda(1) -> Gideon(2) -> Mapp(3) -> FTX/SBF(4).

R2 (UP from R1): recent case, LIVING named defendant. State only adjudicated facts (convicted all 7 counts Nov 2 2023; 25y sentence Mar 28 2024). No real-person likeness — anonymous silhouettes only. All money figures must be sourced to court records before script lock.
Broadens channel from constitutional-rights cases into modern financial-fraud trial. Keep the 'how the system really works' spine to stay on-brand.
